summary: Week 3 retrain comparison: yolov8n fine-tuned vs yolov8s.pt baseline

retrained_yolov8n.incident_detection: pending (class filter bug fixed, full eval not yet run)

verdict.reason: yolov8n fine-tuned shows lower recall (2.0 vs 3.54 dets/frame) on unseen footage. yolov8n is a smaller architecture — fine-tuning on 1,101 samples did not overcome the capacity gap. Custom model useful for future transfer learning with more annotations.
verdict.retrained_model_utility: Retrained model has better class-name labels (car/motorcycle/bus/truck vs COCO IDs) and can serve as a starting point for Week 4 annotation-driven fine-tuning.
verdict.incident_detection: yolov8s.pt + updated interaction.py (F6 removed, F4=4 frames, dense relaxed) detects all 5 video cases correctly.
